caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with text on it, a green cap, and headphones. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing slightly with his hand on his chest, indicating he might be emphasizing a point or sharing a personal story. The overall atmosphere suggests an informal yet professional discussion.
